auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your restaurant
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.

menu.title: Menu Management
menu.subtitle: Manage your menu items, categories, and availability
menu.getStarted: Get started by adding your first menu item
menu.allergensHelp: List any allergens separated by commas
menu.imageFormats: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP
menu.availabilityHelp: Item is active and available to customers
menu.imageLoadError: Failed to load image. Please check the URL.
menu.newItemSubtitle: Create a new position for your menu

categories.title: Category Management
categories.subtitle: Organize your menu items with categories. Drag and drop to reorder.
categories.createFirst: Create your first category to organize your menu items
categories.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{name}"?
categories.deleteWithItems: This category has {count} menu items. You cannot delete a category with items.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Manage and track your restaurant orders
orders.ordersWillAppear: Orders will appear here when customers place them

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your restaurant settings and preferences
settings.botTokenHelp: Get your bot token from BotFather
settings.startBotHelp: Start your bot to receive order notifications
settings.connectBotDescription: Click the button below to connect your Telegram bot and start receiving order notifications.
settings.whatsappHelp: Used for bank transfer payment instructions
settings.enterTokenFirst: Please enter your bot token first
settings.startBotInTelegram: Please start the bot in Telegram to complete the connection

subscription.title: Subscription & Plans
subscription.subtitle: Manage your subscription and explore available plans
subscription.comingSoon: Subscription management will be implemented in a future update
subscription.upgradeComingSoon: Plan upgrade to {planName} will be implemented in a future update

team.title: Team Management
team.subtitle: Manage your team members and their access levels
team.limitReached: You've reached your team member limit. Upgrade your plan to add more members.
team.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {firstName} {lastName} from your team? This action cannot be undone.

roles.adminDescription: Admin: Full access to manage menu, team, and settings.
roles.staffDescription: Staff: Can manage menu items but cannot manage team or settings.

featureLocked.description: Team management is available on PRO and BUSINESS plans. Upgrade your plan to invite team members and collaborate with your staff.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage multiple restaurant locations with location-specific availability
locations.inactiveHelp: Inactive locations won't be available for menu item assignment
locations.enterManually: You can manually enter the address above
locations.addFirst: Add your first location to manage menu availability across different addresses.
locations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this location? This action cannot be undone.

featureLocked.title: Multi-Location Feature
featureLocked.description: Manage multiple restaurant locations with location-specific menu availability. This feature is available on PRO and BUSINESS plans.

analytics.title: Sales Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your sales performance and business insights
analytics.upgradeDescription: Sales analytics is available on PRO and BUSINESS plans. Upgrade now to track your sales performance, view top-selling items, and make data-driven decisions.

features.upgradeToAccess: Upgrade your plan to access this feature
features.upgradeDescription: This feature is only available on the {requiredPlan} plan or higher. Upgrade your plan to unlock this feature and many more.

onboarding.subtitle: Get your restaurant online in 5 minutes

account.title: Create Your Account
account.subtitle: Enter your email and create a secure password
account.passwordHelp: Must be at least 6 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number

store.title: Name Your Restaurant
store.subtitle: This will be displayed to your customers

bot.title: Connect Telegram Bot
bot.subtitle: Get order notifications directly in Telegram
bot.description: A Telegram bot will send you instant notifications when customers place orders.
bot.step1Description: Search for "BotFather" in Telegram or click the button below
bot.step5Description: BotFather will give you a token like: 123456789:ABCdefGHIjklMNOpqrsTUVwxyz
bot.step6Description: This connects your bot to your restaurant
bot.faq1Question: Q: What if my username is taken?
bot.faq1Answer: Try adding numbers or your city name: "mariospizza2024bot" or "mariospizzabishkekbot"
bot.faq2Question: Q: Is my bot token secure?
bot.faq2Answer: Yes, we store it securely and only use it to send you order notifications.
bot.faq3Question: Q: Can I change this later?
bot.faq3Answer: Absolutely! You can update your bot settings anytime in your dashboard.
bot.tokenHelp: You can skip this step and add it later in settings

connect.title: Connect Your Bot
connect.subtitle: Link your Telegram account to receive notifications
connect.linkError: Unable to generate bot connection link. You can connect manually later.
connect.clickButton: Click the button below to connect your Telegram account:
connect.afterClicking: After clicking the link above, send /start to your bot

complete.setupComplete: Your restaurant is now set up and ready to receive orders. Here's what you can do next:
complete.action1: Add your menu items and set prices
complete.shareLink: Share this link with customers to start receiving orders!

onboarding.getStartedFaster: Get started faster with our new onboarding wizard
onboarding.quickSetupDescription: Get your restaurant online in 5 minutes with our guided setup
